title: Add C6 octave note and replace lyrics placeholder with + button

requirements.text: Extend the PianoKeyboard component to include C6 note (one octave higher than the current highest note), maintaining the existing piano keyboard layout and functionality

quotes: keep only 4 holes in the model and add an octave note which would be the continuation of the piano c6

acceptanceCriteria: Piano keyboard displays C6 as an additional white key
Clicking C6 key adds the note to the composition
C6 note is visually consistent with existing piano keys

requirements.text: Add C6 note to the default fingering chart with all 4 holes open on the ocarina, defining it as the highest note in the octave range

quotes: all holes open in the ocarina

acceptanceCriteria: C6 fingering pattern shows all 4 holes open (none covered)
C6 appears in the FingeringEditor component for configuration
Custom fingering chart supports C6 with localStorage persistence

requirements.text: Update CompositionControls playback to support C6 note with synthesized ocarina-style tone at the correct frequency

quotes: add an octave note which would be the continuation of the piano c6

acceptanceCriteria: C6 note plays with Web Audio API synthesis during composition playback
C6 frequency is one octave higher than C5
Playback timing and tone quality matches existing notes

requirements.text: Update SheetMusic component to display C6 note with proper sheet music notation on the staff

quotes: add an octave note which would be the continuation of the piano c6

acceptanceCriteria: C6 note renders correctly on the musical staff with ledger lines if needed
Duration symbols (whole, half, quarter, eighth) work for C6
Note selection and deletion work for C6 notes

requirements.text: Update OcarinaTablature component to render C6 note showing all 4 holes open (unfilled circles) in the 2x2 layout

quotes: all holes open in the ocarina

acceptanceCriteria: C6 tablature displays 4 unfilled/open holes
Tablature respects custom hole shape settings (round, oval, square)
Visual representation is consistent with fingering chart

requirements.text: Update OcarinaVisual play-along component to display C6 note with all 4 holes open (invisible or unfilled) during playback

quotes: all holes open in the ocarina

acceptanceCriteria: C6 visualization shows no covered holes during playback
All 4 holes remain unfilled/invisible when C6 is playing
Rotation and layout alignment remains consistent

requirements.text: Remove the 'Lyrics' placeholder text from SheetMusic component and replace it with a '+' button that appears under each note when no lyrics text has been entered

quotes: it appears at the bottom of each note, just the text lyrics, I don't want to see 'lyrics' under every note unless something has been typed in, so just replace for a + sign

acceptanceCriteria: Notes without lyrics display a '+' button instead of 'Lyrics' text
Clicking '+' button opens lyrics input for that note
Once lyrics are entered, the actual lyrics text displays instead of the '+' button
Empty lyrics show '+' button again if lyrics are deleted

constraints: Keep the 4-hole ocarina model unchanged; do not add a 5th physical hole
Maintain existing localStorage persistence for custom fingering configurations
Preserve the 2x2 hole layout in both OcarinaTablature and OcarinaVisual components
Do not modify the 90° counterclockwise rotation of OcarinaVisual component
nonGoals: Adding more than one new note to the piano keyboard
Changing the existing fingering patterns for notes other than C6
Modifying the lyrics editing functionality beyond the placeholder replacement
Adding a separate keyboard for the octave note
